# Explore all the official templates for Firebase Studio

<SocialEmbed platform="youtube" id="vWfoxcDETY0" />

## Description

Check out and learn how to use one of our many templates for Firebase Studio covering lots of popular frameworks and languages. 

Firebase Studio → https://goo.gle/firebasestudio 


#Firebase 

Speaker: Rody Davis
Products Mentioned: Firebase,

## Transcript

**0:00** · RODY DAVIS: Hi, my name is Rody, devro for Firebase Studio.

**0:03** · And we have a really big template library for you to check out.

**0:05** · To get started, go to studio.firebase.google.com and then click on Add Workspace.

**0:11** · Our template library includes a lot of different options for you, whether you work on the web, backend, frontend, or mobile.

**0:19** · Web, for example, we have Angular, React, Next.JS, Astro, Svelte, and many other templates that you may be familiar with.

**0:27** · If you're looking for something on the backend, we support Go, Python, Java, .NET, Node, Laravel, and so many more.

**0:34** · If you're looking for mobile, we have Flutter, React Native, and even Android Studio on the Cloud.

**0:40** · If you're an ML developer, we also support the Gemini API and Genkit, as well as LangChain.

**0:46** · And of course, if you're working with databases, we have Postgres, MongoDB, MySQL, Prisma, and even Data Connect.

**0:53** · And if you don't find what you're looking for, you can actually get started with an Empty Workspace, which is powered by NixOS.

**0:58** · And you can configure everything based on your current project requirements.

**1:02** · To check out all the templates, you can check it out at studio.firebase. google.com/templates.
